vllm.author: mgoin

vllm.title: [ci][test] fix ca test in main
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt: As observed in https://buildkite.com/vllm/ci-aws/builds/2187#01903b64-42da-4470-b31d-67de70140802 , custom allreduce test in A100 fails, because of a merge race from #5669 .

vllm.title: [LoRA] Add support for pinning lora adapters in the LRU cache
vllm.author: rohithkrn
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Adds support to pin certain lora adapters in the LRUCache. This helps certain latency sensitive adapters to be present in GPU memory without being evicted.

vllm.title: [CI][Hardware][Intel GPU] add Intel GPU(XPU) ci pipeline
vllm.author: jikunshang
vllm.bodyExcerpt: #3814 add XPU ci in test-template.j2 which is outdated and not be triggered.

vllm.title: [Model] Support Qwen-VL and Qwen-VL-Chat models with text-only inputs
vllm.author: DamonFool
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Hi all,
Qwen-VL and Qwen-VL-Chat models are still not supported in vLLM.
I found this fact while I was developing a program which uses Qwen-VL-Chat with text-only inputs.
vLLM fails with KeyError, which had been described in #962 .
Fully supporting Qwen-VL and Qwen-VL-Chat models seems not easy.
How

vllm.title: [Misc] Remove #4789 workaround left in vllm/entrypoints/openai/run_batch.py
vllm.author: zifeitong
vllm.bodyExcerpt: It's not needed after #5654 and will output lots of unnecessary error messages.

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix pin_lora error in TPU executor
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Currently, the TPU backend is broken with the following error:
TypeError: Can't instantiate abstract class TPUExecutor with abstract method pin_lora

This PR is a simple fix for the error.

vllm.title: [Docs][TPU] Add installation tip for TPU
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt: A small tip for a common dependency error on TPU VMs.
